hooks.command: python -c "import pathlib,runpy; cwd=pathlib.Path.cwd().resolve(); root=next((p for p in [cwd,*cwd.parents] if (p/'.codex/hooks/guard.py').is_file()), cwd); runpy.run_path(str(root/'.codex/hooks/guard.py'), run_name='__main__')"
